column1: # Frequency difference (1953 Hz here vs 2000 Hz reference) is invisible.
# Below 10% the i2c_pwm path reads consistently HIGHER nits: +5% at 10%
# ~+56% relative (+7 nits absolute) at 1%. Root cause is the ATtiny85's
# 8-bit duty resolution: brightness=1% rounds to native byte 3
# is highly non-linear near zero (~250 nits per 1% duty in the 0..1% range).
# So this file is REQUIRED for accurate low-brightness reporting on the
# i2c_pwm output - reusing boe_pwm_2khz_reference.csv would over-darken
